prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on furan (9 atoms: O, C×4, H×4) at the DFT level using the tier 'standard' preset — B3LYP/def2-TZVP — in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Exact four-centre two-electron integrals (density fitting OFF). Geometry taken from the user-supplied furan.xyz; single-point, not re-optimized at this level. SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings reported — clean run.

Key results:
  HOMO  (index 17): −6.3597638 eV
  LUMO  (index 18): −0.1024036 eV
  HOMO–LUMO gap:     6.2573602 eV  ← headline value

Koopmans descriptors: vertical IP = 6.3598 eV, vertical EA = 0.1024 eV, electronegativity = 3.2311 eV, chemical hardness = 3.1287 eV, softness = 0.3196 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity index = 1.6684 eV.
Total electronic energy: −230.11429 Hartree (−6261.7289 eV).
Integrity: trustworthy = true (all checks passed). Provenance: computed.
